pr.title: Non-record: Depth Recurrence in Parameter-Constrained Transformers — What Works, What Doesn't, and Why

output.summary: Looped transformer shares four core blocks cycled thrice, augments them with LoRA and BigramHash, and uses noisy QAT to prevent recurrence-driven quantization error.
techniques: Shared-core recurrence with per-cycle LoRA and BigramHash tail
Differentiable noise-based QAT to match int8 error in recycled weights
Controlled flat vs looped A/B studies across GPU tiers
